description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:devel Docker image and defining two stages: build and deploy. In the global before_script export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, run apt update, and install the packages listed in the DEPENDENCIES variable. Add a build job in the build stage that runs meson _build, cd _build, ninja, meson test, starts broadwayd in background, runs GDK_BACKEND=broadway meson test, and finally ninja install. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs meson _build, cd _build, ninja, moves the generated docs/GSvgtk-* files to a public directory, renames public/index.htm to public/index.html, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the pages job defines an artifact with path public and has no special rules.
